summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new admin panel and typing indicator features. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), frontend has state management issues affecting admin panel button visibility.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin panel button not consistently visible - appears after page refresh but disappears during navigation
ui_bugs.root_cause: React state synchronization issue - user role not properly maintained in frontend state

ui_bugs.issue: Session expires or gets lost during navigation, causing redirect to login page
ui_bugs.root_cause: Authentication state not properly persisted across navigation

integration_issues.issue: Admin panel button visibility inconsistent despite proper backend authentication

passed_tests: Admin GET /api/admin/users endpoint - returns users with message_count and role
Admin GET /api/admin/stats endpoint - returns total_users, online_users, total_messages, total_files
Admin DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} - deletes non-admin users and their messages
Admin DELETE prevents deleting admin users (returns 400)
Non-admin users get 403 for admin endpoints
Admin panel loads when accessed directly via /admin route

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All admin and typing endpoints working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Core functionality works, admin panel has visibility issues

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend state management issues: 1) Admin panel button visibility in sidebar - ensure user role is properly maintained in React state across navigation, 2) Session management - prevent authentication state loss during navigation. Backend APIs are fully functional.
